flow_stateMap
func:
const stateMap = {
    22: "OTF_BRAKE",
    21: "OTF_DETECTION",
    20: "WAIT_STOP_MOTOR",
    11: "FAULT_OVER",
    10: "FAULT_NOW",
    8:  "STOP",
    6:  "RUN",
    4:  "START",
    2:  "ALIGNMENT",
    0:  "IDLE"
};
flow.set('stateMap', stateMap)
return msg;
